contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: agroverse_shop: cross-link to capoeira.agroverse.shop from Bico Duro post + Itacaré experience
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/103
  
  Details:
  Cross-linked the new capoeira.agroverse.shop practice platform from the two
  high-signal Bico Duro / Tribo Bahia Mirim touch points already on
  agroverse.shop:
  
  1. The Nov 22 2024 blog post announcing the Agroverse <> Mestre Bico Duro
     partnership now has a prominent CTA card between the title and article
     body — "Practice with Bico Duro from anywhere" + "Start Practicing"
     button linking to capoeira.agroverse.shop.
  
  2. The Itacaré cultural-immersion experience page in the cacao-journeys
     Brazilian path now has a follow-up paragraph right after the existing
     Capoeira-at-Tribo-Bahia copy: "Can't make it to Itacaré yet? Practice
     with Bico Duro from anywhere at capoeira.agroverse.shop ..."
  
  Conscious omissions: no header/footer/site-wide nav link, no
  product-page or checkout-page mentions. Separates buyer journey from
  practice journey; two doors is enough since both target pages already
  have high topical relevance and readers landing there are already
  curious about Bico Duro / Tribo Bahia Mirim.
  
  Inline styles (no new CSS classes) to keep the diff self-contained and
  match agroverse_shop's warm earthy palette (#faf7f2 bg / #fefc8f accent).
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta#103 (merged squash). Beta only —
  production sync to agroverse_shop_prod (which deploys www.agroverse.shop)
  still needs to run per docs/TWO_REPO_SETUP_GUIDE.md.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
